review.notes: Scaffolding coherent and extension-only. Build/test NOT executed in this environment (no AL compiler / Sandbox) — GREEN must be confirmed on Sandbox via F5. Minors are non-blocking follow-ups.

findings.message: Namespace inconsistency: app uses 'DefaultPublisher.DynaQuery', test uses 'DynaQuery.Test', publisher is 'EneaFrontera'. Reconcile with the DQ/prefix decision.
findings.fix-hint: Resolve open question Q1 (prefix/namespace) before Phase 4 and align all namespaces.

findings.message: platform is '1.0.0.0' placeholder in both app.json files.
findings.fix-hint: Set platform to the real minimum (e.g. 28.0.0.0). Note: user previously reverted this to 1.0.0.0 — confirm before changing.

findings.message: Root .vscode/launch.json is now orphaned (no AL project at root after restructure).
findings.fix-hint: Use the per-project app/.vscode & test/.vscode configs or the .code-workspace; remove or repurpose the root one.

findings.message: Smoke test uses codeunit ID 50149; spec allocated tests to 50140-50145.
findings.fix-hint: Optionally renumber to an allocated test band, or keep 50149 as the reserved smoke slot and note it.

findings.message: test/app.json intentionally omits test-toolkit deps (Library Assert, Tests-TestLibraries); smoke test is self-contained. To be added with verified GUIDs in Phase 3/5.
findings.fix-hint: Add verified toolkit dependencies when tests first reference Assert / Library - Lower Permissions.
